## How it was tested

<!-- Commands you ran, scenarios you exercised, screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused — one logical concern.
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`uv run python -m pytest`, `npm test`).
- [ ] Linters pass (`uv run ruff check .`, `npx ng lint`).
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`type(scope): …`).
- [ ] Docs / README / `.env.example` updated if behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] No hardcoded URLs, keys, or thresholds — config goes through `config/` + `.env`.
